question.label: What landed
question.name: What part of the feedback from that decision actually landed with you?
question.description: Surfaces what he absorbed versus what may have bounced off or been misunderstood.

answer: I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.

assessment.note: He signaled a controllable-focus response to the promotion feedback, which suggests some clarity but also a growth stall around avoiding less controllable work.
